new_classes.definition_en: Grape must other than that of heading 2009, excluding partly fermented grape must with an actual alcoholic strength exceeding 0.5% vol; subheading group covering grape must in fermentation or with fermentation arrested otherwise than by addition of alcohol, and other grape must.

new_classes.label_en: Fermentation in progress or arrested without alcohol addition quality
new_classes.label_de: Gärung im Gange oder ohne Alkoholzusatz stummgemacht (Qualitätsmerkmal)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality of grape must indicating that fermentation is either currently in progress, or has been arrested by means other than the addition of alcohol (e.g. by chilling, SO2, or other physical/chemical means), distinguishing CN 2204 30 10 from CN 2204 30 92 and 2204 30 96.

new_classes.label_en: Grape must in fermentation or with fermentation arrested otherwise than by addition of alcohol (CN 2204 30 10)
new_classes.label_de: Traubenmost, teilweise gegoren, auch ohne Alkohol stummgemacht (KN 2204 30 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Other grape must (CN 2204 30) whose fermentation is either currently in progress or has been arrested by means other than the addition of alcohol. Corresponds to CN subheading 2204 30 10.

coverage_explanation: The primary discriminating criterion — that the grape must is in fermentation or has had fermentation arrested otherwise than by addition of alcohol — is captured via the new FermentationArrestedWithoutAlcoholQuality quality class. The fresh-grape origin is modelled via the reused FreshGrapeOriginQuality. The legal text also cross-references Additional Notes 2(a), 2(b), 2(c) and 3 to Chapter 22, which specify numeric thresholds for actual alcoholic strength and total dry extract that further subdivide this subheading within TARIC. These numeric conditions (e.g. actual alcoholic strength limits linked to additional note 2) are not fully expressed as OWL datatype restrictions here because the specific numeric values from Additional Notes 2 and 3 are not provided in the supplied legal text excerpt. Coverage is therefore 0.85 rather than 1.0.
